pages.image_tooltip: A variant of the slime made with magic, organic ooze, and a little bit of love; Living Ooze is the perfect incubator for embryos.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Fill a §aCauldron§7 with §aOrganic Ooze§7 to create your very own Living Ooze
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Living Ooze can be collected and transported using a §aBucket§7
pages.feature_3.tooltip: Living Ooze can be right clicked with an embryo to begin gestation; after a certain amount of time has passed, the ooze will spit out the developed baby
